exercises.title: Shuttling Time Budget
exercises.description: Calculate the time overhead for a circuit requiring ions to be shuttled between zones.
exercises.starterCode:
# Given parameters
gate_time_us = 100  # Two-qubit gate time
shuttle_distance_mm = 1.0  # Distance between zones
shuttle_speed_m_s = 5.0  # Shuttling speed
junction_time_us = 100  # Time per junction crossing

# Circuit: 10 two-qubit gates, each requiring 2 shuttles and 1 junction
n_gates = 10
shuttles_per_gate = 2
junctions_per_gate = 1

# Calculate times
shuttle_time_per_op = shuttle_distance_mm * 1e-3 / shuttle_speed_m_s * 1e6  # us

total_gate_time = n_gates * gate_time_us
total_shuttle_time = n_gates * shuttles_per_gate * shuttle_time_per_op
total_junction_time = n_gates * junctions_per_gate * junction_time_us
total_time = total_gate_time + total_shuttle_time + total_junction_time

print(f"Gate time: {total_gate_time} us")
print(f"Shuttle time: {total_shuttle_time} us")
print(f"Junction time: {total_junction_time} us")
print(f"Total: {total_time} us")
print(f"Overhead: {100*(total_time - total_gate_time)/total_time:.0f}%")
exercises.solution:
gate_time_us = 100
shuttle_distance_mm = 1.0
shuttle_speed_m_s = 5.0
junction_time_us = 100

n_gates = 10
shuttles_per_gate = 2
junctions_per_gate = 1

shuttle_time_per_op = shuttle_distance_mm * 1e-3 / shuttle_speed_m_s * 1e6

total_gate_time = n_gates * gate_time_us
total_shuttle_time = n_gates * shuttles_per_gate * shuttle_time_per_op
total_junction_time = n_gates * junctions_per_gate * junction_time_us
total_time = total_gate_time + total_shuttle_time + total_junction_time

print(f"Gate time: {total_gate_time} us")
print(f"Shuttle time: {total_shuttle_time:.0f} us")
print(f"Junction time: {total_junction_time} us")
print(f"Total: {total_time:.0f} us")
print(f"Overhead: {100*(total_time - total_gate_time)/total_time:.0f}%")
print(f"\nThis shows that shuttling overhead can be significant!")
